response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song '罪と罰' (Tsumi to Batsu) by the virtual performer Yukisaki Riona, originally by Ringo Sheena. The entire video is a single, continuous musical performance.

scenes.description: The virtual performer Yukisaki Riona performs the song '罪と罰' (Tsumi to Batsu) on a stage with dramatic red lighting, featuring a pink car as a central prop.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Yamate street in the morning stings my cheeks
I throw away an empty pack of cigarettes
Today again I have no space even for my feet
And my small room pampers my loneliness

"Don't love my restless shrieking
Don't look to the future
Just live in the moment, something you can be confident in
Call out my name right
Touch my body; acknowledge that this is the only thing you need"

I love you. I'm bawling all alone
And I wander about the streets at night, but I feel so lifeless
The cheap fluorescent lights at the ticket gates
Don't even cast your shadow

Ah, that warped, distant and uncertain day smells like Seven Stars
Tasting them brings me right back to that time of the year
The fact that I wished for anything at all goes well beyond contradiction
Your voice was more precious to me than anything in the world.
Did I make that hoarse, too...?

A German car and a police car break the silence
Sirens, roaring, the real world
A certain floating

"Don't love my restless shrieking
Don't look to the future
Just live in the moment, something you can be confident in
Call out my name right
Touch my body; acknowledge that this is the only thing you need"

response.thoughts:
**Analyzing the Music Video and Preparing for Retrieval**

Okay, so I've got this music video to analyze. My task is to break it down, identify what's happening, and, crucially, find the official lyrics. From what I gather, it features a VTuber-style character, likely named Yukisaki Riona (thanks to the hashtag!), performing "罪と罰" (Tsumi to Batsu) by Ringo Sheena. It's a continuous performance, not segmented into distinct scenes with different songs; it's a single, unbroken piece from start to finish (00:00 to 04:56). The VTuber is in a black and white outfit with a black jacket and there seems to be another character or the same in a different outfit/style: blond hair, black outfit,

So, here's my plan: I need to conduct a search using the "Parallel Search Strategy". I'll use the `web_search_langsearch_multi` tool. This seems straightforward enough.

Now, let's get the queries ready. For the initial search, my target is the official Japanese lyrics, so I'll use `罪と罰 椎名林檎 歌詞` as the first query and `Tsumi to Batsu Ringo Sheena lyrics English` as the second. I have to make sure to adhere to the instruction:  I absolutely *must* retrieve the full, unedited lyrics and not, under any circumstances, use placeholders. This is critical.

I am ready to use the tool and generate the tool calls. Let's get this done.



**Finalizing the Tsumi to Batsu Analysis**

Okay, the data's in. I've successfully located the official lyrics for "Tsumi to Batsu" – the Japanese version and a reliable English translation. Now, it's time to craft the final response. My focus needs to be on ensuring the response is accurate, well-structured, and provides a clear understanding of the song's meaning, drawing on the lyrics' nuances. I have the artist information as well, it's Ringo Sheena, performed here by Yukisaki Riona. The search was precise. I can move on to the interpretive part of the response now.
